'''''Zol-Uvena''''' was one of the [[Starship/Legends|ships]] used by [[Shistavanen/Legends|Shistavanen]] [[Scout/Legends|scout]] [[Yurdak Fav]]. It had been modifed to be more maneuverable and had a different weapon system than normally installed on the model.<ref name="AIR" />
